name: Articuno
notes: Static legendary bird. object_event SPRITE_BIRD ... ARTICUNO, 50 (objects/SeafoamIslandsB4F.asm).

name: Zapdos
notes: Static legendary bird. object_event SPRITE_BIRD ... ZAPDOS, 50 (objects/PowerPlant.asm).

name: Moltres
notes: Static legendary bird. object_event SPRITE_BIRD ... MOLTRES, 50 (objects/VictoryRoad2F.asm).

name: Mewtwo
notes: Static legendary. object_event SPRITE_MONSTER ... MEWTWO, 70 (objects/CeruleanCaveB1F.asm). Requires all badges to enter cave.

name: Snorlax
notes: Blocks the road; wake with Poke Flute. scripts/Route12.asm sets SNORLAX, wCurEnemyLevel=30.

name: Snorlax
notes: Blocks the road; wake with Poke Flute. scripts/Route16.asm sets SNORLAX, wCurEnemyLevel=30.

name: Marowak
notes: Ghost Marowak. Fought as opponent RESTLESS_SOUL at level 30 (scripts/PokemonTower6F.asm); only identifiable/battleable with the Silph Scope. NOT catchable - it departs when defeated (no capture). dexNumber is Marowak (105) since that is the species the ghost represents.

name: Voltorb
notes: 6 static Voltorb disguised as item balls (SPRITE_POKE_BALL). object_event ... VOLTORB, 40 x6 (objects/PowerPlant.asm).

name: Electrode
notes: 2 static Electrode disguised as item balls (SPRITE_POKE_BALL). object_event ... ELECTRODE, 43 x2 (objects/PowerPlant.asm).

name: Bulbasaur
notes: Choose-one starter. scripts/OaksLab.asm sets wCurEnemyLevel=5. Rival takes the type-advantaged starter.

name: Charmander
notes: Choose-one starter. scripts/OaksLab.asm sets wCurEnemyLevel=5. Rival takes the type-advantaged starter.

name: Squirtle
notes: Choose-one starter. scripts/OaksLab.asm sets wCurEnemyLevel=5. Rival takes the type-advantaged starter.

name: Eevee
location: Celadon City - Celadon Mansion (roof-access room, near Dept. Store)
notes: Gift Poke Ball. scripts/CeladonMansionRoofHouse.asm: lb bc, EEVEE, 25.

name: Hitmonlee
notes: Choose one of Hitmonlee/Hitmonchan after beating the Dojo. scripts/FightingDojo.asm: ld c, 30; GivePokemon.

name: Hitmonchan
notes: Choose one of Hitmonlee/Hitmonchan after beating the Dojo. scripts/FightingDojo.asm: ld c, 30; GivePokemon.

name: Lapras
notes: Gift from a Silph employee after clearing Team Rocket. scripts/SilphCo7F.asm: lb bc, LAPRAS, 15.

name: Magikarp
notes: Magikarp salesman. Costs ¥500. scripts/MtMoonPokecenter.asm: lb bc, MAGIKARP, 5; price 500 (hMoney+1=$05). Technically a purchase, not free; classed as gift-style scripted acquisition.

name: Omanyte
notes: Revived from the Helix Fossil (Mt. Moon reward). engine/events/cinnabar_lab.asm HELIX_FOSSIL->OMANYTE; scripts/CinnabarLabFossilRoom.asm ld c, 30; GivePokemon.

name: Kabuto
notes: Revived from the Dome Fossil (Mt. Moon reward). engine/events/cinnabar_lab.asm DOME_FOSSIL->KABUTO; scripts/CinnabarLabFossilRoom.asm ld c, 30; GivePokemon.

name: Aerodactyl
notes: Revived from the Old Amber (Pewter Museum). engine/events/cinnabar_lab.asm OLD_AMBER->AERODACTYL (else branch); scripts/CinnabarLabFossilRoom.asm ld c, 30; GivePokemon.

name: Nidorina
notes: Player GIVES Nidorino, RECEIVES Nidorina (nicknamed TERRY). Received mon's level = the level of the Pokemon you trade in (variable), so 'level' is null. Source: data/events/trades.asm; map from scripts/*.asm.

name: Mr. Mime
notes: Player GIVES Abra, RECEIVES Mr. Mime (nicknamed MARCEL). Received mon's level = the level of the Pokemon you trade in (variable), so 'level' is null. Source: data/events/trades.asm; map from scripts/*.asm.

name: Seel
notes: Player GIVES Ponyta, RECEIVES Seel (nicknamed SAILOR). Received mon's level = the level of the Pokemon you trade in (variable), so 'level' is null. Source: data/events/trades.asm; map from scripts/*.asm.

name: Beedrill
notes: UNUSED trade left in the data (Japanese-version leftover); not reachable in English Red/Blue. Player GIVES Butterfree, RECEIVES Beedrill (nicknamed CHIKUCHIKU). Received mon's level = the level of the Pokemon you trade in (variable), so 'level' is null. Source: data/events/trades.asm; map from scripts/*.asm.
